How to Choose the BEST Health Insurance Plan in 2026 | Sanjay Kathuria

Most people think health insurance is just about low premiums. But one mistake can cost you lakhs during a real emergency.

In this video, Sanjay Kathuria explains how to choose the right health insurance policy, the 7 hidden traps most people fall for, and what features are non-negotiable in a good plan.

✅ Real case study: ₹4.5 lakh emergency without insurance
✅ The 7 hidden traps: co-pay, room rent limits, sub-limits & more
✅ Key features every plan must have
✅ Live comparison of real policies in the market
✅ How to customize your policy based on your family’s needs

🎯 This video is in collaboration with Ditto Insurance — a trusted platform that helps you choose the right policy and supports you through the claim process.

comments.text:
BEWARE of NIVA BUPA.....They are the most FRAUDESTER company in Medicla insurance. They will never pay you if your claim amount is high. Recently my mother (68 years) got heart attack and treatment was taken in Fortis Hospital but they rejected my claim asking that once she had Arthritis 22 years ago and they need that Prescription of Doctor as hard copy. I explained that at time she had taken medication only for a month, she got relief and never has taken medication since then, also how can any one keep a Doctors prescription for 22 years, but they were adament on asking the 22 years ago prescription and they rejected my claim of 4.5 lacs on that ground. Infact with each day and my follow up they began to raise new request asking for Diabetes First prescription given by Dr. in 2015 (however diabetes was declared in policy), asking for Dengue prescription once she had in 2009.
I visited their office and found people that they settle big claims 1/100 otherwise they raise query in 99% cases of big amount. If you claim amount is equal or twice the premium amount you are paying then it is okay for them to settle the claim, but if your claim amount is higher or equal to policy limit then even GOD will not save you from NIVA BUPA.
They know that my mother is in elderly age and the claim of 4,50 lacs will be paid in 8 premium amount and that too if every thing goes okay with my mother in future, as such playing on a safer side NIVA BUPA choose the way to escape by raising unrealistic query to my claim.
After a long harrassment by them I asked them to cancel my policy and give my premium balance left in a year ( I paid the premium thrice before for same policy of RS. 65000 every year), but they denied this refund also to me. If any one had any doubt I can present the proof to them. 
So, I decided to expose them on every social platform so that no other person shall get befooled by them.
I will recommend people that if your claim is twice the limit of your premium then it is okay for the company to pay you but if you think that your policy is of 15 lacs and you go to the Hospital thinking you have nothing to pay as your Insurance company will take care of you, then you are COMPLETELY WRONG. You have to pay from your pocket and you will be Debt. So instead of paying these company I wil recommend to save the premium amount to your bankers and get them Fixed deposit and use it when required. In either case you have to suffer then why to suffer because of some third person as you will feel more robbed as you have paid twice once you had paid to insurance company and secondly you have paid to Hospital.
Please BEWARE of NIVA BUPA

comments.text:
Just follow these-

1.Buy from any PSU(Govt)healthcare insurance company which is nearest to your home.

2.Buy though agent only.2-3% extra charge may be added but it matters during emergency.I repeat only offline through office.

3.Fill proposal from yourself only.Disclose all truth regarding health condition

4.Avail TPA for cashless claim.

5.Save Agent's mobile no and Branch's no in your mobile and inform to your family members.

6.Try to buy sum insured 5 lakh or above.atleast 3 lakh + with sum restoration add on.

7.Understand the bed rate proportionality clause from branch properly.

8.Do not buy unnecessary add ons.

Rest will be taken care by the Govt.Have a happy life.

N.B-I have health insurance from UIIC.Wonderful experience from them for 3 claims already settled with 80-85% cost return with cashless facility.
